allow: PowerShell($body = '{"full": true}'; $headers = @{ 'Authorization' = 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImJ3anB0b2Nua3FlZGFrZGlib3N1Iiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NTQ4Njg1ODgsImV4cCI6MjA3MDQ0NDU4OH0.TtTahIvd8ahTzDqAgH62EAPGMRBCkM-fD5OjmGwYpcw'; 'Content-Type' = 'application/json' }; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri 'https://bwjptocnkqedakdibosu.supabase.co/functions/v1/cdr-sync-products' -Headers $headers -Body $body -TimeoutSec 540; $r | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $s = New-Object IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host $s.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($c = Get-Command supabase -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "FOUND: " + $c.Source; supabase --version } else { "NOT FOUND" }; $env:SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN -ne $null)

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\.supabase\\access-token", "$env:APPDATA\\supabase\\access-token", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\supabase\\access-token"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND token file: $p" } }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.supabase"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.supabase" -Force | Select-Object Name } else { "no .supabase dir in USERPROFILE" })

PowerShell($urls = @\("https://www.rfstore.uy/producto/notebook-asus-core-i3-4-4ghz-8gb-512gb-ssd-15-6-fhd-win-11-not3296", "http://rfstore.uy/producto/notebook-asus-core-i3-4-4ghz-8gb-512gb-ssd-15-6-fhd-win-11-not3296"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UserAgent "WhatsApp/2.23.20.0" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; $t = $r.Content; if \($t -match 'og:title" content="\([^"]+\)"'\) { "$u => STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\) OG:TITLE: $\($Matches[1]\)" } else { "$u => STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\) SIN og:title" } } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp -ne $null\) { "$u => STATUS $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\) Location: $\($resp.Headers['Location']\)" } else { "$u => ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })

PowerShell($slug = "notebook-asus-core-i3-4-4ghz-8gb-512gb-ssd-15-6-fhd-win-11-not3296"; $urls = @\("https://www.rfstore.uy/producto/$slug/", "https://www.rfstore.uy/producto/$slug`?utm_source=wpp", "https://www.rfstore.uy/Producto/$slug"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UserAgent "WhatsApp/2.23.20.0" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $t = $r.Content; if \($t -match 'og:title" content="\([^"]+\)"'\) { "$u`n   => $\($Matches[1]\)" } else { "$u`n   => GENERICO/SPA \(sin og:title de producto\)" } } catch { "$u`n   => ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($slug = "notebook-asus-core-i3-4-4ghz-8gb-512gb-ssd-15-6-fhd-win-11-not3296"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.rfstore.uy/producto/$slug" -UserAgent "WhatsApp/2.23.20.0" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; if \($r.Content -match 'og:description" content="\([^"]{0,120}\)'\) { "DESC: [$\($Matches[1]\)]" } } catch { "ERROR desc: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.rfstore.uy/producto/$slug/" -UserAgent "WhatsApp/2.23.20.0" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; if \($r2.Content -match 'og:title" content="\([^"]+\)"'\) { "SLASH FINAL: OK => $\($Matches[1]\)" } else { "SLASH FINAL: aun generico \(deploy en curso\)" } } catch { "ERROR slash: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($dir = "C:\\Users\\Admin\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-Admin-Desktop-NexusCode-Proyectos-rfstore\\ea55f96c-c35c-4e6c-b248-ec323128eafb\\scratchpad"; $urls = @\("https://bwjptocnkqedakdibosu.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/product-images/home/0e9b3d7b-2dec-4581-945a-346b7e16a93b.jpeg","https://bwjptocnkqedakdibosu.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/product-images/home/86318ae3-f7cf-408f-a7e5-47f26630f4df.jpeg","https://bwjptocnkqedakdibosu.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/product-images/home/4836a04d-0a4e-45bc-8474-356cb627924d.jpeg"\); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $i=0; foreach \($u in $urls\) { $f = Join-Path $dir "slide$i.jpeg"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -OutFile $f -UseBasicParsing; $img=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($f\); "slide$i : $\($img.Width\) x $\($img.Height\)  \(ratio $\([math]::Round\($img.Width/$img.Height,2\)\)\)"; $img.Dispose\(\); $i++ })
